Question: Considering the credit advisor with equal ranking and cross-default terms in the 2023 liability management tranche, the lead arranger constrained by spending limits in the 2019 high-yield refinancing, the syndicate participant restricted by payment lock-ups in the 2022 post-rate-hike group, and the sub-agent with capital expenditure restrictions also in the 2022 post-rate-hike cohort, what is the highest spread increase among these scenarios?
